notes: Facts sourced from src/lib/holidays/country-hub-data.js's already-verified Syria section (Presidential Decree 188/2025, dated 5 Oct 2025) — no fresh web research needed since this was already fact-checked and sourced in a prior session (General Secretariat of the Presidency communique, 30 March 2026).
This was a genuine gap: country-hub-data.js's Syria christmas entry had eventSlug: null despite the date/legal-basis already being verified — this event fills that gap.

Strictly civic/legal register (holiday-status facts only), matching the neutral-record standard already used on revolution-day-syria/liberation-day-syria/evacuation-day-syria — no theological content.
relatedSlugs deliberately excludes orthodox-easter-syria for now since that event doesn't exist yet at time of writing (building it next in the same batch) — will be added back once it's live.
Single-country event (_countryCode: sy), aliasSlugs: [] to avoid base_country_leakage.
